1.0.0.en: Initial release. Add each Eight Sleep bed side as its own device and sign in with your account. Per-side power and target temperature (13-44 °C); live bed presence, heart rate, HRV and breath rate; sleep stage and fitness/quality/routine scores plus time slept; bed and room temperature. Alarms with next-alarm display, snooze/stop and one-off alarms. Away mode, Pod priming and water-low alerts. Adjustable Base support (head/feet angle, snore mitigation, presets) when a Base is paired. A dashboard widget with quick temperature and power controls, plus rich Flow triggers, conditions and actions.

1.0.1.en: Fix bed presence detection so the 'bed became empty' and 'someone got into bed' Flow triggers fire reliably - including when you get back into bed and when Eight Sleep returns a placeholder entry for the current day.

1.0.2.en: Homey App Store review polish: updated store copy and Flow wording, refreshed the driver icon, resized driver imagery, and added reviewer notes for the certification update.

1.0.3.en: Public release hardening: migrate legacy device-store credentials into app settings, remove duplicated credential storage, sanitize API error logging, and keep internal project handoff notes out of the public app repo.
